title: Consumer Product Safety Program, Regional Product Safety Offices and Cosmetics Program - Canada.ca
content:
## Consumer Product Safety Program, Regional Product Safety Offices and Cosmetics Program
Use the Consumer Product Safety General Enquiries Form to request information related to toys, childcare articles, household products, baby products, cosmetics, consumer chemicals, textiles, sport or garden products, second-hand products or consumer goods.
When submitting general enquiries please include your location including province or state so your enquiry can be directed to the nearest regional office.
To report incidents or complaints regarding a consumer product or cosmetic product; fill out the Report an unsafe consumer product or cosmetic form.

### To contact us by phone:
Toll free: 1-866-662-0666 (Canada and U.S. only) Teletypewriter: 1-800-465-7735 (Service Canada)

### To contact us by mail:
Consumer and Hazardous Products Safety Directorate Health Environments and Consumer Safety Branch Health Canada 219 Laurier Avenue West A.L. 4913A Ottawa, ON K1A 0K9
Regional Product Safety Office Suite 1917, 1505 Barrington St. Halifax, NS B3J 3Y6
Regional Product Safety Office Suite 400 - 4595 Canada Way Burnaby, BC V5G 1J9
Regional Product Safety Office Health Canada 2301 Midland Avenue Toronto, ON M1P 4R7
Regional Product Safety Office Canada Place Suite 910 - 9700 Jasper Av Edmonton, AB T5J 4G3
